name: AAA Transportation
registry_source: NC Secretary of State (no clear public corporate-filing match); business directory confirms operating at listed address
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate); SAFER 'AAA Transportation' keyword search returned only Bellflower CA (USDOT 2243083) and Houston TX (USDOT 3310896) — neither matches Gastonia NC address. Business directory (north-carolina.travel-us.org / Manta) confirms AAA Transportation at 2240 N New Hope Rd # A, Gastonia, NC 28054, categorized as Transportation Services NEC, owner Aron Jordan, phone (704) 861-0819. Also known regionally as 'AAA Taxi' per Manta/Nextdoor — likely a taxi/livery/shuttle operator, not heavy charter/school bus. Distinct from the well-known 'AA Transportation Co., Inc.' (aatransportation.com, MA-based). NC SOS public corporate search did not return a confirmed entity record visible in indexed results; entity may be a sole proprietorship or assumed-name DBA.
